UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within the OpenMind OS application. Authentication details are handled externally by Firebase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: Represents a user's personal goal, including its status, category, and deadlines.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Goal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this goal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Goal)

title.description: A concise title for the goal.

description.description: A detailed description of the goal.

deadline.description: The target date by which the goal is expected to be completed.

category.description: The category the goal belongs to (e.g., 'Career', 'Health', 'Learning').

priority.description: The priority level of the goal (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High', 'Critical').

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., 'NotStarted', 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'OnHold', 'Archived').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the goal.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was marked as completed (optional).

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a single task associated with a goal, including tracking of time and completion.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

goalId.description: Reference to the Goal this task belongs to. (Relationship: Goal 1:N Task)

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this task. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Task)

title.description: A concise title for the task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

estimatedTime.description: Estimated time required to complete the task, in minutes.

actualTimeSpent.description: Actual time spent on the task, in minutes.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the task has been completed.

deadline.description: The target date/time by which the task should be completed.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was marked as completed (optional).

tagIds.description: References to Tag entities associated with this task. (Relationship: Task N:N Tag)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the task.

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a user-defined tag that can be applied to tasks or knowledge nodes for categorization and filtering.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tag entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this tag. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Tag)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was created.

KnowledgeNode.title: KnowledgeNode
KnowledgeNode.description: Represents a single node in the user's personal knowledge graph, which can be a skill, topic, goal, or note.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KnowledgeNode entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this knowledge node. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N KnowledgeNode)

title.description: The title or name of the knowledge node.

content.description: Detailed content or description for the node (e.g., skill description, note text).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the knowledge node was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the knowledge node.

embedding.description: Placeholder for the AI embedding vector of this node's content, for future ML integration.

KnowledgeEdge.title: KnowledgeEdge
KnowledgeEdge.description: Represents a directional relationship between two KnowledgeNode entities in the user's personal knowledge graph.

id.description: Unique identifier for the KnowledgeEdge entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this knowledge edge. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N KnowledgeEdge)

sourceNodeId.description: Reference to the ID of the source KnowledgeNode. (Relationship: KnowledgeNode N:N KnowledgeNode via KnowledgeEdge)

targetNodeId.description: Reference to the ID of the target KnowledgeNode.

description.description: A descriptive text for the nature of the relationship.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the knowledge edge was created.

AnalyticsMetric.title: AnalyticsMetric
AnalyticsMetric.description: Stores various analytical metrics and insights related to user productivity, goals, and tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AnalyticsMetric entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this metric belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AnalyticsMetric)

value.description: The numerical value of the metric.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the metric was recorded or calculated.

period.description: The time period this metric applies to (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'overall').

goalId.description: Optional reference to a specific Goal if the metric is goal-specific. (Relationship: Goal 1:N AnalyticsMetric)

taskId.description: Optional reference to a specific Task if the metric is task-specific. (Relationship: Task 1:N AnalyticsMetric)

LearningRoadmap.title: LearningRoadmap
LearningRoadmap.description: Represents an AI-generated personalized learning roadmap for a user to achieve a target role.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningRoadmap entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns this learning roadmap. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N LearningRoadmap)

targetRole.description: The target job role for which the roadmap was generated (e.g., 'AI Engineer').

timelineMonths.description: The desired timeline in months for completing the roadmap.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the learning roadmap was generated.

RoadmapStep.title: RoadmapStep
RoadmapStep.description: Represents a single step within a generated LearningRoadmap, outlining specific learning objectives and resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RoadmapStep entity.

learningRoadmapId.description: Reference to the LearningRoadmap this step belongs to. (Relationship: LearningRoadmap 1:N RoadmapStep)

order.description: The sequential order of this step within its learning roadmap.

title.description: A concise title for the roadmap step (e.g., 'Learn Python Fundamentals').

description.description: A detailed description of the objectives and content for this step.

estimatedDurationWeeks.description: The estimated duration in weeks to complete this step.

skillIds.description: References to KnowledgeNode IDs representing skills required or covered by this step. (Relationship: RoadmapStep N:N KnowledgeNode)

suggestedTaskIds.description: References to Task IDs representing suggested tasks to complete this step. (Relationship: RoadmapStep N:N Task)

status.description: The current status of this roadmap step (e.g., 'NotStarted', 'InProgress', 'Completed', 'Skipped').

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the step was started (optional).

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the step was completed (optional).

definition.description: Stores user profile information, uniquely identified by the Firebase Authentication UID. Owned by the user themselves.
Stores user-specific personal goals. Each document includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence, ensuring ownership by the authenticated user.
Stores tasks belonging to a specific goal and owned by the user. Each document includes denormalized 'userId' and 'goalId' for authorization independence, enabling robust security rules.
Stores user-defined tags for categorizing tasks and knowledge nodes. Each document includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

Stores individual knowledge nodes (skills, topics, goals, notes) within a user's personal knowledge graph. Includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence and supports future AI embeddings.
Stores directional relationships between a user's KnowledgeNode entities. Includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.
Stores user-specific analytical metrics related to productivity and goals. Each document includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.
Stores AI-generated personalized learning roadmaps owned by the user. Each document includes a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.
Stores individual steps within a user's learning roadmap. This document MUST include a denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence and QAPs, in addition to 'learningRoadmapId'.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for OpenMind OS is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling, as mandated by the core design principles. All user-specific data is rooted under a top-level `users` collection, with each user's data residing in a document at `/users/{userId}`. This path directly maps to the authenticated user's UID, providing immediate path-based ownership for the `UserProfile`.

For all subsequent entities (Goals, Tasks, Tags, KnowledgeNodes, KnowledgeEdges, AnalyticsMetrics, LearningRoadmaps, and RoadmapSteps) that belong to a user, a hierarchical path structure is adopted, such as `/users/{userId}/goals/{goalId}`. This design choice inherently supports the 'Private Data' and 'Hierarchical Paths for User-Owned Data' access modeling strategies, ensuring that data access is tightly coupled with the authenticated user.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL)** is achieved through comprehensive denormalization. For every document within a user's subcollection (e.g., `goals`, `tasks`, `knowledgeNodes`), the `userId` of the owning user is explicitly stored as a field within that document. For instance, a `Task` document, while living under `/users/{userId}/goals/{goalId}/tasks/{taskId}`, will also contain its own `userId` field. This denormalization eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls in Firestore Security Rules to verify parent ownership. Rules can simply check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` and `request.auth.uid == userId` (from the path wildcard), ensuring atomic and secure operations.

**QAPs (Queries Are Not Filters)** are fully supported by this structure. When a user requests a list of their goals (e.g., querying `/users/{userId}/goals`), the security rules can enforce that `request.auth.uid` matches the `{userId}` wildcard in the path. Furthermore, the denormalized `userId` within each `Goal` document allows for an additional, robust check (`resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid`) to prevent data leakage and ensure that only genuinely owned documents are returned. This explicit validation within the document itself, rather than relying on inferred parent ownership, ensures that `list` operations are both secure and performant, adhering to the principle that rules are not filters. Structural Segregation is maintained by keeping all user-private data distinct and uniformly secured within their respective user paths, avoiding mixed security postures in any single collection.
